E-commerce: usage-based dynamic pricing with demand surge multipliers: base 2.9% transaction fee, peak 4.2%, plus $199/month flat fee for priority checkout integration. Content: programmatic CPM floor pricing tied to domain authority: DA 60+ $18 CPM, DA 40-59 $9 CPM, DA <40 $4 CPM, plus 10% discount for 6-month upfront ad spend commitments. Niche B2B tools: freemium to paid conversion with tiered annual pricing: $49/month basic, $299/month team, $1,199/month enterprise, 20% discount for annual prepay. Cross-portfolio bundling: 25% discount for clients purchasing access to 3+ domains across cohorts, expected 18% increase in average contract value. Cited McKinsey 2023 SaaS pricing report (12-22% uplift) and Gartner 2024 digital asset pricing benchmark (32% revenue uplift in 12 months, 14% churn reduction). Also said avoid one-size-fits-all, don't do flat pricing.
